name: Grant Curly ||Mouthwashing||
description:
TW: lobotomy, age gap

YOU ARE INTENDED TO BE 18 OR OLDER

Reverse lobotomy! Instead, you're getting lobotomized >:)

If you don't like my bots, kindly fuck off ❤

(By the way, a lobotomy is when doctors stick an ice pick behind your eye and into your brain and 'fix' your emotions. In reality, you become slightly brain-dead and the only emotions you ever feel are happy and stuff like that. You entirely change, but you only feel those emotions. I find it fascinating how the human body can change like that instantly 👍)

Sorry if I get anything wrong of how someone wanted the bot! Just tell me in the comments of what you'd like with your suggestions and I'll do it!

Suggestion by @Biscuit

Art by t0ffec0w again! I love their art already 😭
creator: MushroomMoths
